name_cn:
【Haiyuan Exclusive Real Shot Chip Version】
M11393 Black, Apricot, White. This Babylone Tote handbag traces back to the trendy Paris Babylone community. Crafted with fine calfskin to outline clean lines, offering ample space for daily essentials. Features a central zip pocket and adjustable handles for crossbody or shoulder wear. 31 x 21.5 x 13 cm (Length x Height x Width)
